summary: Completed testing of Add Student Wizard for School Principal Dashboard. Fixed critical async/await bug in student_management_engine.py that was causing 500 errors. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend wizard tested successfully through all 4 steps.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: student_management_engine.py was using synchronous MongoDB operations (find_one, insert_one, count_documents, list()) with async Motor driver - converted all to async/await
All wizard form fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend APIs properly return default grades/sections when none exist in database
MOCKED DATA: Dashboard metrics (students: 1245, teachers: 87, classes: 42) are static mock data in SchoolDashboardContent.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add Student Wizard is fully functional. Backend APIs for student options (grades, sections, nationalities, blood-types, parent-relations) all working. Student creation API tested and working. Dashboard metrics are MOCK DATA.

principal_login.description: Principal can login with principal@nassaq.com / Principal123!

principal_dashboard.description: Dashboard displays with key metrics, attendance summary, alerts, and quick actions

quick_actions.description: All 6 quick action buttons visible (إضافة طالب, إضافة معلم, إنشاء فصل, إنشاء جدول, الحصص الجارية, إرسال إشعار)

step4_review.description: Review step displays all entered data correctly with Confirm & Save button

backend_apis.GET /api/students/options/sections: PASSED - Returns 3 default sections (A, B, C)
backend_apis.POST /api/students/create: PASSED - Creates student with full data

bugs_fixed.fix: Converted all synchronous MongoDB operations to async/await pattern using cursor.to_list(), await find_one(), await insert_one(), await count_documents(), etc.

mocked_data_note: Dashboard metrics (1245 students, 87 teachers, 42 classes, 156 sessions, 342 active users, 3 substitute sessions) are MOCK DATA in SchoolDashboardContent.jsx
